message: Documentation cleanup: backfill CHANGELOG entries for v1.3.7 (IiqLocation custom field UUID resolution), v1.5.1 (web-app dashboard + ChartRegistry), and v1.6.0 (telemetry rollout). Add a dashboard chart-coverage map to README.md and GUIDE.md showing which analytics sheets render as Chart.js cards vs KPI badges, organized by tab. No code changes.
